Career Stats & Summary - Rugby League Project|first=Shawn Dollin and Andrew|last=Ferguson|website=Rugbyleagueproject.org|accessdate=16 October 2017}}{{cite web|url=http://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Antoni-Maria/|title=Players - Love Rugby League|website=Loverugbyleague.org|accessdate=16 October 2017}}[http://www.itsrugby.co.uk/player_11705.html itsrugby] | updated = {{date|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}|DMY}} | module = {{infobox person | embed = yes | father = | mother = | spouse = | education = | alma_mater = | relatives = [[Franck Maria]] (brother) }} }} '''Antoni Maria''' (born 21 March 1987) is a French [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[FC Lezignan]] in the [[Elite One Championship]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He previously played in France for the [[Saint-Gaudens Bears]] in the [[Elite One Championship]], [[Toulouse Olympique]] [[Elite One Championship|French top flight]] and the [[Co-operative Championship]] and [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]]. Maria then transferred to the [[Catalans Dragons]] and the [[Leigh Centurions]] in the [[Super League]]. He spent time on loan from the [[Catalans Dragons|Dragons]] at [[Hull Kingston Rovers]]. ==Background== Maria was born in [[Sainte-Livrade-sur-Lot]], [[France]]. He is the elder brother of professional rugby league footballer [[Franck Maria]]. ==Club career== ===Toulouse Olympique=== Maria began his career at [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] between 2009 and 2011. ===Catalans Dragons=== When Toulouse withdrew from the Championship, Maria joined [[Super League]] club [[Catalans Dragons]], making his [[Super League]] début against [[Castleford Tigers]] in 2012. ===Leigh Centurions=== Maria joined [[Leigh Centurions]] for the 2017 season following their promotion to Super League.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/36833777|title=Leigh Centurions: Danny Tickle and Antoni Maria join Championship side|date=19 July 2016|accessdate=16 October 2017|website=Bbc.co.uk}} ===Catalans Dragons (return)=== In October 2017 Maria signed a two-year deal to return to [[Catalans Dragons]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/41782998|title=Antoni Maria: Catalans Dragons re-sign Leigh Centurions prop|publisher=BBC Sport|date=27 October 2017 |accessdate=24 January 2018}} ====Hull Kingston Rovers==== On 25 April 2019 he joined [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] on an initial one month's loan due to an injury crisis at the East Hull outfit. He made his debut for the Robins 3 days later in the 28-24 away defeat by the [[Leeds Rhinos]] ===FC Lézignan XIII=== On 17 July 2020 it was reported that he had signed for [[FC Lézignan XIII]] in the [[Elite One Championship]]{{cite web|website=BBC Sport|date=17 Jul 2020|accessdate=13 Jan 2021|title=Antoni Maria: Catalans Dragons prop to leave at end of 2020 season|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/53442644}} ==International career== Maria is a [[France national rugby league team|France]] international. He was a member of the French team that played in the [[2013 Rugby League World Cup]], in the [[2014 European Cup|2014]] and [[2015 European Cup]] tournaments. He also played for France in their 2015 European Cup mid-tournament test-match against England.{{cite web|url=http://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/live/match/43791/report|title=England demolish France 84-4 in record win|website=Skysports.com|accessdate=24 October 2015}} ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-18-maria-antoni/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[https://leighrl.co.uk/wp/team_member/maria-antoni/ Leigh Centurions profile] *[http://www.ffr13.fr/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/antony_maria-791x1024.jpg France profile] *[http://www.rlwc2017.com/players?team=380#Antoni-Maria 2017 RLWC profile] *[https://www.superleague.co.uk/player/230/antoni-maria SL profile] {{France 2013 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{France 2017 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Maria, Antoni}} [[Category:1987 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Hull Kingston Rovers players]] [[Category:Leigh Leopards players]] [[Category:Lézignan Sangliers players]] [[Category:Rugby league props]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Nouvelle-Aquitaine]] [[Category:Saint-Gaudens Bears players]] [[Category:Sportspeople from Lot-et-Garonne]] [[Category:Toulouse Olympique players]] {{France-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
